title: Chapter 7: A Summer Walking in the Footsteps of History

text_block_list.text: This happened before the summer training camp. When I asked Chrono Genesis how she wanted to spend her day off――
choice_data_list: Is there somewhere you want to go?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes… There's the site of a former racecourse… 
located a day trip away by train from the training camp…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It was abandoned a long time ago, but countless matches were held there… I've been interested in it for a while now…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
And so…… um…… well…… 
………………

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer. 
Would you… like to come with me…?
choice_data_list: Is it okay if I come along?
Is it okay if I come along?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes. Um, there's nothing there now, but…From a historical perspective, I believe it's a very significant place…!
choice_data_list: Sounds good, let's go together

text_block_list.text: And so, on the summer training camp's day off.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
U-Um… If you'd like, please take a look at this. 
It's a summary… of the racecourse we're going to.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It summarizes the history of the racecourse and its race results. Well… Only the part I was able to find, though…
choice_data_list: <size=38>Did you put all this together yourself, Chrono?</size>
<size=38>Did you put all this together yourself, Chrono?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes…! I thought that having some background knowledge… 
might make it more enjoyable for you, Trainer…
choice_data_list: Thank you, this helps a lot!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Really…!? 
…………I'm glad…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… We still have some time before the train arrives. 
I'll go buy us some drinks.
After getting off at our destination, we walk along a narrow path filled with the scent of grass. Since just walking would be boring—
choice_data_list: Rock, paper… scissors!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… I win…! 
Let's see… G- R- A- D- E- R- A- C- E-…tsu.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. 
It's a neck-and-neck race……!
choice_data_list: (Chrono's having a lot of fun)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Oh right. If I recall, up ahead there's… 
…………Ah.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Trainer… Would you like to take a detour to that shrine over there? It's a place with ties to racing as well…
choice_data_list: Then whoever gets there first wins!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Hehe… You're on. I'll make sure to keep my lead all the way to the end. Well then――…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper………… scissors!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
choice_data_list: Aah～ this shade is a lifesaver～…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Yes… I feel completely revived.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… That's right. This shrine… was apparently famous for prayers of victory in the past. It's said that the runners back then would always come to pray before a race.
choice_data_list: Whoa…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it must have been bustling… 
With so many people coming to support them, too…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
However, the desire to win hasn't changed since then… 
Their earnest feelings are just the same as ours…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… It's strange. Even though they're from a distant past, 
I feel somewhat close to them…
choice_data_list: (Just the same as us… huh)
(Just the same as us… huh)

text_block_list.text:
After that, we left the shrine and started walking again. 
Passing through the long, long path, the place we finally arrived at was――

…………Nothing. 
Or rather, to be more accurate, there was just a small memorial monument.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…………I'm sorry. 
Um, this historical site is… much simpler than I expected…
choice_data_list: <size=33>But, you can still feel the traces of what it used to be</size>

text_block_list.text: The shrubs growing along the path… are probably the remnants of the course. Thanks to her summary, I can imagine what it looked like back then.
choice_data_list: <size=36>I bet that area over there was the final straight…</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Then… the gates must have been right here. 
Receiving the cheers of the fans from around that area…………

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
The moments before the start… hearts pounding… 
With expectations of victory… and a little bit of anxiety…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Rounding the 4th corner, into the final straight… 
…Wanting to dash across the finish line first. Because there's someone you want to deliver that result to……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Things like that… I'm sure. Crying, laughing… 
Well… it's just my own imagination, though.
choice_data_list: No, I get it

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Eh…?
choice_data_list: <size=34>I can understand how the supporters felt, at least</size>
<size=34>I can understand how the supporters felt, at least</size>

text_block_list.text: My thoughts turn to the trainers of that era. Imagining them watching over their horsegirls… it makes me feel like I can't afford to lose to them either.
choice_data_list: <size=39>It's almost like……we're connected to history</size>
<size=39>It's almost like……we're connected to history</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…I see… 
So you're seeing the same scenery as me, Trainer…
choice_data_list: …Chrono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah…! 
Um, I'm going to go take some pictures over there…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(I-I ran away… Was that weird of me all of a sudden? 
But…)
『It was a day where I really felt your passion, too!』
『It was a day where I really felt your passion, too!』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (You really… meant it. Trainer…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (You're seriously… trying to understand me…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (…………I don't want to forget this scenery)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Being here today… 
might be too modest to call history, but…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Just like… the people who built the memorial monument here in the past…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (I'll give shape to the history of this moment――…)
(Click)

While waiting for the train back… 
Chrono Genesis checks the photos she took.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: This one… I wish I had paid a bit more attention to the composition. I should've blurred the background a bit more, too…
choice_data_list: But it still came out beautifully

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I-Is that so…? 
Hehe… Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Let's see, the next photo is…………

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Eh? Is this… Trainer…?
choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
N-No… Um, it's nothing…! 
Ah… The train is coming, so that's enough of that…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(When did I end up taking that photo… 
Anyway… it's rude, so I have to delete it later…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (…………But… I really do want to keep just one…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Um…! Trainer, if you don't mind—!
